compositional_truth_check.P1_String_of_Nickels: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible plant matter.
compositional_truth_check.P2_Mexican_Mint: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible plant matter.
compositional_truth_check.P3_Pothos: Present: Single leaf specimen remains, showing signs of severe chlorosis/senescence.
compositional_truth_check.P4_Silver_Guest: Systemic Loss: No evidence of secondary specimen in P2/P4 shared space.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: The biome is largely devoid of the registered specimens. Only a single, struggling Pothos leaf remains in the P3 pot.

plant_audit.P3: Single Pothos leaf, yellowing, high probability of terminal decline.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears damp/dark, potential for anaerobic conditions due to lack of transpiration.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P3; paper receipt introduced in T-1; electronic component (IC chip) introduced in CURRENT.
biome_observations.surface: Desk surface is cluttered with non-botanical debris.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Stable decline; Pothos leaf remains static.
temporal_deltas.T-1: Introduction of paper receipt near P2/P1.
temporal_deltas.CURRENT: Introduction of a small electronic component (IC chip) on the desk surface.

visual_health_inference.P3_Pothos: Terminal: The leaf is chlorotic and lacks turgor pressure. The absence of other specimens suggests a failure in the micro-biome environment.

anomalies: Eggshell fragments in P3 (likely calcium amendment attempt).
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome has suffered a near-total collapse of the registered botanical inventory. The Pothos specimen in P3 is the sole survivor, exhibiting severe signs of physiological stress. The environment has shifted from a botanical focus to a collection of miscellaneous debris, including paper and electronic components, which are not conducive to plant health.
